variables.name: sharedRecordId
variables.description: The interaction ID of the contact that's created in ServiceNow shown on the console.

variables.name: Customer_Name
variables.description: The value of the customer name pulled from ServiceNow.

variables.name: snow_interaction_description
variables.description: The description of the interaction record that's created on ServiceNow.

variables.name: sn_queue_sysid
variables.description: The voice queue on ServiceNow that the contact is queued towards - For reporting purposes.

variables.name: sn_queue_id
variables.description: Queue ID of the ServiceNow Queue from AWA > Queues

promptsTts.value: Welcome to the Webex Contact Center for Service Now Demo!
